title: President Miguel Diaz-Canel guarantees 'unbreakable resistance' after Trump threatens Cuba
summary_full: Cuban leader Miguel Diaz-Canel has proclaimed 'iron-clad determination' to stand firm against aggressive US posturing, referencing Donald Trump's latest comments on 'taking over Cuba.' This declaration comes amid a dire fuel and economic crisis for the island, made worse by US blockades on oil shipments.
